hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then exit 0; fi; missing=""; if ! git diff origin/dev..HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'apps/web/src/components/AppLayout.tsx'; then if ! git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'apps/web/src/components/AppLayout.tsx'; then missing="$missing AppLayout.tsx"; fi; fi; if ! git diff origin/dev..HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'apps/web/src/pages/ChangelogPage.tsx'; then if ! git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'apps/web/src/pages/ChangelogPage.tsx'; then missing="$missing ChangelogPage.tsx"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then echo '{"stopReason": "Version bump or changelog missing — bump version in AppLayout.tsx and update ChangelogPage.tsx before pushing"}'; exit 1; fi
